policy_rows.label: Worker dispatch backoff
policy_rows.poison_message_action: Move the work item into DLQ posture and require operator redrive after durable state preconditions are rechecked.
policy_rows.redrive_gate: Redrive is legal only when the same command receipt, manifest stage, and stage-precondition hash still match current truth.

source_refs.rationale: ADR-002 fixed the broker as a transport-only fabric fed by transactional outbox and inbox receipts, explicitly rebuildable from durable truth.
The runtime topology names a queue or broker for outbox and worker coordination while forbidding it from becoming legal truth.
Queue backlog rebuild must come from durable outbox, inbox, interaction, workflow, and audit truth rather than broker history.
Outbox messages, queues, read models, and general logs may only carry opaque refs and basis hashes, never raw tokens or secrets.
Inbound callbacks and worker results must enter through authenticated transactional inbox and dedupe layers before any state transition.

source_refs.source_heading_or_logical_block: 9.4 Request identity, idempotency, and ingress proof
source_refs.rationale: Authority callbacks and recovery reads must preserve request lineage, canonical ingress receipts, and duplicate suppression before mutation.
The dependency register marks the broker as MVP-required but still unresolved as a procurement or platform choice.
Object-store notifications already freeze logical channel names for scan, validation, evidence binding, preview, export, quarantine, retention, and restore flows.
Delivery callbacks remain evidence-only transport inputs and must not upgrade workflow truth directly.
Scheduler and retry work must preserve durable dedupe tuples rather than deriving legality from worker-local retry memory.

notes: A blocked or poisoned worker dispatch must not be hidden behind endless requeue loops.

policy_rows.label: Artifact processing backoff
policy_rows.poison_message_action: Dead-letter the transport event and surface durable processing failure so scan, preview, or binding repair can re-drive from immutable refs.
policy_rows.redrive_gate: Redrive requires the same object version, upload-session lineage, and downstream safety preconditions to remain valid.

Inbound callbacks and worker results must enter through authenticated transactional inbox and dedupe layers before any state transition.

source_refs.source_heading_or_logical_block: 9.4 Request identity, idempotency, and ingress proof
source_refs.rationale: Authority callbacks and recovery reads must preserve request lineage, canonical ingress receipts, and duplicate suppression before mutation.
The dependency register marks the broker as MVP-required but still unresolved as a procurement or platform choice.
Object-store notifications already freeze logical channel names for scan, validation, evidence binding, preview, export, quarantine, retention, and restore flows.
Delivery callbacks remain evidence-only transport inputs and must not upgrade workflow truth directly.
Scheduler and retry work must preserve durable dedupe tuples rather than deriving legality from worker-local retry memory.

notes: At-least-once storage events and downstream retries must converge onto one immutable object-version identity.

policy_rows.label: Authority send and poll backoff
policy_rows.poison_message_action: Stop live transport work, preserve the request lineage, and move the execution attempt into a quarantined inbox record for explicit operator or control-plane review.
policy_rows.redrive_gate: Before re-drive, the runtime must revalidate token lineage, authority link, request identity, and persisted reconciliation control against current truth.

source_refs.rationale: ADR-002 fixed the broker as a transport-only fabric fed by transactional outbox and inbox receipts, explicitly rebuildable from durable truth.
The runtime topology names a queue or broker for outbox and worker coordination while forbidding it from becoming legal truth.

Inbound callbacks and worker results must enter through authenticated transactional inbox and dedupe layers before any state transition.

source_refs.source_heading_or_logical_block: 9.4 Request identity, idempotency, and ingress proof
source_refs.rationale: Authority callbacks and recovery reads must preserve request lineage, canonical ingress receipts, and duplicate suppression before mutation.
The dependency register marks the broker as MVP-required but still unresolved as a procurement or platform choice.
Object-store notifications already freeze logical channel names for scan, validation, evidence binding, preview, export, quarantine, retention, and restore flows.
Delivery callbacks remain evidence-only transport inputs and must not upgrade workflow truth directly.
Scheduler and retry work must preserve durable dedupe tuples rather than deriving legality from worker-local retry memory.

notes: No blind resend is legal just because a message left the broker without confirmation of downstream completion.

policy_rows.label: Authority ingress normalization backoff
policy_rows.poison_message_action: Quarantine the ingress receipt and block any legal-state mutation until authenticated correlation and canonical dedupe are resolved explicitly.
policy_rows.redrive_gate: Normalization may replay only from the canonical ingress receipt and request-lineage packet, never from raw transport timestamps or broker-only identifiers.

Inbound callbacks and worker results must enter through authenticated transactional inbox and dedupe layers before any state transition.

source_refs.source_heading_or_logical_block: 9.4 Request identity, idempotency, and ingress proof
source_refs.rationale: Authority callbacks and recovery reads must preserve request lineage, canonical ingress receipts, and duplicate suppression before mutation.
The dependency register marks the broker as MVP-required but still unresolved as a procurement or platform choice.
Object-store notifications already freeze logical channel names for scan, validation, evidence binding, preview, export, quarantine, retention, and restore flows.
Delivery callbacks remain evidence-only transport inputs and must not upgrade workflow truth directly.
Scheduler and retry work must preserve durable dedupe tuples rather than deriving legality from worker-local retry memory.

notes: Callback duplicates are expected and lawful only when they collapse onto one canonical ingress receipt.

policy_rows.label: Delivery evidence backoff
policy_rows.poison_message_action: Dead-letter the evidence append and surface a durable review item rather than inventing successful delivery or governance completion.
policy_rows.redrive_gate: Delivery evidence redrive is legal only if the same delivery binding, masking posture, or retention event identity still exists in durable truth.

source_refs.rationale: Authority callbacks and recovery reads must preserve request lineage, canonical ingress receipts, and duplicate suppression before mutation.
The dependency register marks the broker as MVP-required but still unresolved as a procurement or platform choice.
Object-store notifications already freeze logical channel names for scan, validation, evidence binding, preview, export, quarantine, retention, and restore flows.
Delivery callbacks remain evidence-only transport inputs and must not upgrade workflow truth directly.
Scheduler and retry work must preserve durable dedupe tuples rather than deriving legality from worker-local retry memory.

notes: Delivery and governance channels stay observational; repeated transport failure must not mutate workflow truth by implication.

policy_rows.label: Restore and rebuild backoff
policy_rows.poison_message_action: Move failed restore indexing into DLQ posture and keep environment reopen blocked until checkpoint evidence is repaired.
policy_rows.redrive_gate: Redrive requires the same checkpoint, candidate identity hash, restore evidence bundle, and reopen gate set to remain current.

notes: Restore-time queue work is admissibility-bound and therefore intentionally conservative.

The runtime topology names a queue or broker for outbox and worker coordination while forbidding it from becoming legal truth.

source_refs.rationale: Authority callbacks and recovery reads must preserve request lineage, canonical ingress receipts, and duplicate suppression before mutation.
The dependency register marks the broker as MVP-required but still unresolved as a procurement or platform choice.
Object-store notifications already freeze logical channel names for scan, validation, evidence binding, preview, export, quarantine, retention, and restore flows.
Delivery callbacks remain evidence-only transport inputs and must not upgrade workflow truth directly.
Scheduler and retry work must preserve durable dedupe tuples rather than deriving legality from worker-local retry memory.

typed_gaps: Provider-specific retry and DLQ tuning values remain unresolved until the platform chooses one broker family.
notes: Poison-message handling is explicit and must never degrade into infinite requeue loops.
